summary: Completed comprehensive testing of AZ Riscossione Tributi website with CMS functionality. All major features working correctly including homepage with 10 services, admin authentication, Media Manager with 5 default folders, Modulistica with 7 categories, public modulistica page, and contact form.

design_issues.issue: HTML validation warnings - nested <a> tags in navigation menu

passed_tests: Homepage loads with hero section and 10 services
Admin login with credentials admin@azriscossione.it / AzAdmin2024!
Admin dashboard with all tabs (Media Manager, Modulistica, etc.)
Media Manager displays drag&drop upload zone
Media Manager shows 5 default folders (Modulistica, Loghi Comuni, etc.)
Modulistica tab shows Documents and Categories sub-tabs
Modulistica Categories shows 7 default categories (IMU, TARI, TOSAP, etc.)
Public modulistica page has search bar and filters
Public modulistica page has category sidebar
Contact form at /contatti works and accepts input
Cookie banner appears and functions correctly
All 23 backend API endpoints return expected status codes
